description: Log in to Canvas as admin (canvas@example.edu / canvas-docker) and create two events for the 'CHEM101' course calendar. The 'Final Exam Review Session' event must be scheduled 7 to 14 days from today from 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM, with 'Science Building Room 204' in the location/description and 'comprehensive review' and 'practice problems' in the description. The 'Drop-in Office Hours - Final Prep' event must be scheduled exactly one day before the review session from 2:00 PM to 3:00 PM, with 'Faculty Office 312' in the location/description and 'one-on-one' and 'last chance'
